title: Garbha Upanishad: Within the Womb
description: From the Garbha Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Garbha Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: In the seventh month the child knows that he is in the womb. He remembers his past lives. He resolves: 'When I am born, I will worship God and seek liberation.' But at birth, the touch of Vishnu's wind makes him forget all his past lives, and he is born ignorant.
